publications.title: Visible Light Communication Based Indoor Positioning System
publications.description: A VLC-based indoor localization system using photodiode sensors and ML-driven calibration.

publications.title: IoT-Based Remote Health Monitoring for Rural Clinics
publications.description: An IoT patient-monitoring system with MQTT data transmission and rule-based anomaly detection.

publications.title: Smart Wearables and Cloud Computing for Preventive Healthcare
publications.description: A wearable-cloud architecture with AI-driven alerts for chronic-disease risk detection.
